summary: Complete testing of AWS AdFlow Ad Selection Pipeline portfolio project. All major features working correctly with one minor backend logging fix applied.

fixed_bugs.issue: Logger variable used before definition in server.py
fixed_bugs.location: Line 167 used logger before line 385 definition
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Moved logging configuration to top of file

fixed_bugs.issue: API router included before endpoint definitions
fixed_bugs.location: app.include_router called before /api/warmup and /api/test endpoints defined
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Moved router inclusion to end of file after all endpoints defined

minor_issues.impact: Soak test (200 messages, 1s delay) takes longer than 30s timeout

passed_tests: Hero section displays 'Matthew R. MacFarlane' and 'AdFlow Real-Time Bid Engine' correctly
All 5 tabs navigation working (Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Course, About Me)
Live Testing tab shows test profile options (warmup, steady, burst, soak)
Warm Up AWS button visible and clickable, integrates with backend API
Run Test button visible and functional
Architecture tab shows Professor's Template vs My Implementation comparison
Optimizations tab shows performance improvements with FREE/SAVES $ badges
Course tab shows correct course info (IDC5131, Prof. Gil Salu, New College of Florida)
About Me tab shows all education institutions (NCF, Flatiron, Catholic University, West Point)
About Me tab shows certifications (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes)
Contact email matthew.macfarlane27@ncf.edu displays correctly in header and About section
Backend API /api/test endpoint working for warmup, steady, burst profiles
GitHub and LinkedIn links functional in header
Tab content loads properly for all sections
Warmup button shows state changes after API calls
